arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Dayot Upamecano on Bayern Munich's defensive stability under Vincent Kompany, Der Klassiker and more
arts.sum: Speaking in an exclusive interview with bundesliga.com, the France defender also discussed the Bundesliga leaders' upcoming trip to Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker and former club RB Leipzig... Like I said, it’s a pleasure playing with him because he's calm, and he’s a bit like me as a player, he is powerful on the pitch.

arts.ttl: “We are still able to compete with Premier League clubs for the best players in the world”— Bayern Munich CEO happily recalls signing of Harry Kane
arts.sum: Jan-Christian Dreesen had been promoted to CEO of Bayern just before the transfer window kicked off, so one of his very first tasks in this new, daunting role was to lead negotiations for one of the best Premier League strikers of all time, a club legend, and a former Leyton Orient player with the notoriously hard headed Daniel Levy. Bayern Munich ’s signing of Harry Kane was truly a story for the ages.

arts.ttl: Patrik Schick, Harry Kane, Robert Lewandowski and players to score a perfect hat-trick in the Bundesliga
arts.sum: And there have been no fewer than 31 perfect hat-tricks in the Bundesliga since official data collection began back in 1992, starting with Karlsruhe's Sergei Kiriakov in 1993 and including such luminaries as Giovane Élber, Claudio Pizarro, Mario Gómez, Chicharito, Lewandowski, Harry Kane and of course Schick . In a campaign that saw him score a division record 41 league goals for Bayern - including three hat-tricks and one four-goal turn - Lewandowski refused to let the empty stadia of the COVID era stop him and he proved 'perfect' in big wins against Eintracht Frankfurt ( 5-0 ) and then Stuttgart ( 4-0 ).

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich eyes yet another winger talent in the exciting Bazoumana Touré
arts.sum: However, internal sources say that the left winger is not ready for Bayern yet. Bayern has Bazoumana Touré (18) from Hammarby on their list.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans could face nightmare Champions League away trip to Zagred after Borussia Dortmund lodge fan treatment protest
arts.sum: Celtic fans travelling for their Champions League away match against Dinamo Zagreb may be in for a rough trip after Borussia Dortmund’s experience. The Daily Record reports that Dortmund have lodged an official protest with UEFA and some fans had almost turned around and boycotted the match in the Maksimir Stadium.
